untranslatable_reason: Fundamental screening conditions are not available as quantifiable indicators in the allowed set. The signal requires external fundamental data (per author's process) which cannot be expressed using technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Translated '52-week high' to Donchian upper band (dc_upper) with 252-day lookback as the closest technical proxy. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 with 1.2 multiplier. Entry day gap-down requirement expressed as prev_close > open to ensure no gap down. Exit conditions include both the 20-day SMA cross and a secondary confirmation. Direction is LONG only since context_dependent direction is best expressed as LONG with high-volatility/trending regime filters.
